user_input.raw: Okay, and should you have produced a new v38-session.md to reflect the "cut"? It was nice to see the v37 full JSON as we were just getting things in shape here. Although I would have understood if the v37 full JSON had been compressed. I see that you do plan to compress the v37 JSON. But, seeing as you're going to be doing a v39 cut, think about this for a moment: you also should compress the v38 JSON. It's just the v39 JSON that shouldn't be compressed when you do this next v39 cut; the v39 cut should be to firm up the logic here; I know incrementing and handling this sort of stuff is actually mildly tricky even if in principle it sounds not too difficult.
